strengths: Demonstrated proper loop introduction technique with controlled instrument movements
Maintained steady camera positioning throughout the positioning phase
Showed understanding of the basic loop manipulation mechanics
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the 180-second time limit
Did not successfully secure the ligating loop on the target appendage
Lacked efficient progression from positioning to cinching and tail cutting phases

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: Practice opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening, focusing on speed and accuracy
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the task within time limit

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause to verify alignment, then practice the cinching motion without time pressure
drills.targets_weakness: Did not successfully secure the ligating loop

drills.name: Tail-cut finish drill
drills.description: Practice 10 secure loop placements followed by controlled tail cuts without disturbing the loop position
drills.targets_weakness: Lacked efficient progression to tail cutting phase

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid positioning skills into complete task execution within time constraints. Work on smooth transitions between phases rather than perfecting individual movements.
